body:
# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-LFC-012](task-0044): Shared Baseline Sync Engine for Lifecycle and Bootstrap

## Purpose

Create shared baseline sync engine for lifecycle and bootstrap.

## Scope

- Sync engine
- Lifecycle integration
- Bootstrap integration

## Implementation

1. Build sync engine
2. Integrate lifecycle
3. Integrate bootstrap

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Engine functional
2. Lifecycle integrated
3. Bootstrap integrated
